name: AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Cartridge
summary: The AVEO Industrial Series Easy-Press Cartridge is a top-fill vaporiser designed for the cannabis industry.
description: The AVEO Industrial Series Easy-Press Cartridge is a top-fill vaporiser designed for the cannabis industry. Its advanced capabilities, including a wide top-fill design, patented locking mouthpiece, and low failure rates, make it a top choice among vape brands. Brands can save time, money, and resources while providing a high-quality vaping experience with this efficient and reliable cartridge. Due to the strong locking seal, once the mouthpiece is attached, you can not reopen it without damaging the cartridge. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
